title: News For Country Cousins.
content:
В В В В Dear Coz, as I know neither you nor Miss Draper,
В В В В When Parliament's up, ever take in a paper,
В В В В But trust for your news to such stray odds and ends
В В В В As you chance to pick up from political friends-
В В В В Being one of this well-informed class, I sit down
В В В В To transmit you the last newest news that's in town.

В В В В As to Greece and Lord Cochrane, things couldn't look better--
В В В В His Lordship (who promises now to fight faster)
В В В В Has just taken Rhodes and despatched off a letter
В В В В To Daniel O'Connell, to make him Grand Master;
В В В В Engaging to change the old name, if he can,
В В В В From the Knights of St. John to the Knights of St. Dan;--
В В В В Or if Dan should prefer (as a still better whim)
В В В В Being made the Colossus, 'tis all one to him.

В В В В From Russia the last accounts are that the Tsar--
В В В В Most generous and kind as all sovereigns are,
В В В В And whose first princely act (as you know, I suppose)
В В В В Was to give away all his late brother's old clothes[1]--
В В В В Is now busy collecting with brotherly care
В В В В The late Emperor's nightcaps, and thinks, of bestowing
В В В В One nightcap apiece (if he has them to spare)
В В В В On all the distinguisht old ladies now going.
В В В В (While I write, an arrival from Riga--the "Brothers"--
В В В В Having nightcaps on board for Lord Eldon and others.)

В В В В Last advices from India--Sir Archy, 'tis thought,
В В В В Was near catching a Tartar (the first ever caught
В В В В In N. Lat. 2l.)--and his Highness Burmese,
В В В В Being very hard prest to shell out the rupees,
В В В В And not having rhino sufficient, they say, meant
В В В В To pawn his august Golden Foot[2] for the payment.

В В В В (How lucky for monarchs, that thus when they choose
В В В В Can establish a running account with the Jews!)
В В В В The security being what Rothschild calls "goot,"
В В В В A loan will be shortly, of course, set on foot;
В В В В The parties are Rothschild, A. Baring and Co.
В В В В With three other great pawnbrokers: each takes a toe,
В В В В And engages (lest Gold-foot should give us leg-bail,
В В В В As he did once before) to pay down on the nail.

В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В В  *В В В В В В В В В В В В  *В В В В В В В В В В В В  *В В В В В В В В В В В В  *В В В В В В В В В В В В  *

В В В В This is all for the present--what vile pens and paper!
В В В В Yours truly, dear Cousin--best love to Miss Draper.

В В В В September, 1826.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Thomas Moore delivers a powerful performance in "News For Country Cousins."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
